# serval_approval_delegations (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "serval_approval_delegations" "example_approval_delegations" {
  delegator_user_id = "delegatorUserId"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `delegator_user_id` (String) Optional user ID to list delegations for a specific user.
- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the delegation was created.
- `delegates` (Attributes List) The delegates who can approve on behalf of the delegator. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--delegates))
- `delegator_user_id` (String) The ID of the user who is delegating their approvals.
- `description` (String) A description of the delegation rule.
- `id` (String) The ID of the approval delegation.
- `priority` (Number) The priority of the delegation rule (lower values are higher priority).

<a id="nestedatt--items--delegates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.delegates`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The ID of the delegate (user ID or group ID, depending on type).
- `type` (String) The type of delegate (user or group).
Available values: "APPROVAL_DELEGATE_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED", "APPROVAL_DELEGATE_TYPE_USER", "APPROVAL_DELEGATE_TYPE_GROUP".
